# shelly_script_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The ID of the Script component instance.
- `ip` (String) The IP address of the Shelly device.

### Optional

- `enable` (Boolean) true if the script runs by default on boot, false otherwise
- `name` (String) Name of the script
